summary: Tested Module Interconnection (Data Linking) feature - 3 new bridge endpoints. All 10/10 backend tests pass. Frontend buttons verified in source code with correct data-testid attributes.

minor.issue: PosResponse model was missing linked_rilievo_id field (fixed)

critical_code_review_comments: Minor fix applied: Added linked_rilievo_id field to PosResponse model in /app/backend/models/sicurezza.py
seed_data_creation: Created test user and session via mongosh for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Module Interconnection feature fully tested. Bridge endpoints: POST /api/preventivi/from-distinta/{distinta_id} creates Preventivo from BOM with configurable markup (default 30%), POST /api/invoices/from-preventivo/{preventivo_id} creates Invoice from Preventivo and updates preventivo status to 'accettato', POST /api/sicurezza/from-rilievo/{rilievo_id} creates POS with auto-filled cantiere (address, city, committente from rilievo location and client). Frontend buttons exist in DistintaEditorPage (btn-crea-preventivo), RilievoEditorPage (btn-genera-pos), and PreventivoEditorPage (btn-convert-invoice). The existing convert endpoint POST /api/preventivi/{id}/convert-to-invoice still works alongside the new POST /api/invoices/from-preventivo/{id} endpoint.

tested_endpoints.notes: Creates Preventivo from BOM with default 30% markup
Creates Invoice (bozza) from Preventivo, updates preventivo status
Creates POS with auto-filled cantiere (address, city, committente)

elements_tested: Button visible after saving distinta (CONFIRMED via Playwright)
Button visible only for existing (non-new) preventivi

fix_applied.description: Added linked_rilievo_id field to PosResponse model to properly return the field stored by the from-rilievo endpoint
